articles.title: Google Home gets upgraded Gemini voice assistant and new camera controls - Ars Technica

articles.description: Bose Corp. announced a trio of products under a new “Lifestyle Collection” that’s intended to meld the company’s audio technologies and innovative engineering with elegant hardware, pitting it against familiar rivals like Sonos Inc. and Apple Inc.

articles.description: The fire broke out at the former East London Central Synagogue on Tuesday morning.
